ORACLE OFFLINE
🔮
Greetings, adventurer. I am the Oracle — your guide to the 2014 Player's Handbook. Ask me anything about 5e rules, spells, classes, combat, or mechanics as written in the original 2014 PHB. I answer strictly from that book and nothing else.
☁️ Cloud Sync
Not connected
Used to identify which device last saved. Anything works.
How to sync:
1. Set a device name → Save to Cloud on this device
2. Open CODEX on your other device → Load from Cloud
3. Data syncs instantly via Firebase ✦
